name: NexGen Energy Ltd.
content: NexGen Energy is a leading Canadian company focused on the development of the Rook I Project in the Athabasca Basin, Saskatchewan. Rook I hosts the world-class Arrow Deposit, which is one of the largest and highest-grade undeveloped uranium resources globally. NexGen is committed to delivering a new standard for elite mining through high ESG performance and is positioned as a future cornerstone supplier for the global nuclear power industry.
